sections.title: Audit Summary
sections.content: This report covers 12 function-level surfaces from examples/solana-basic

sections.content: 16 evidence items could not be determined during triage

sections.title: Candidate Hypotheses
sections.content:
Candidate hypotheses:
- [engine-derived] AuthorityBypassCandidate — Authority bypass candidate in 'vault::withdraw' (untrusted external call)
- [engine-derived] AuthorityBypassCandidate — Authority bypass candidate in 'vault::deposit' (missing authority check)
- [engine-derived] AuthorityBypassCandidate — Authority bypass candidate in 'vault::initialize' (missing authority check)
- [engine-derived] AuthorityBypassCandidate — Authority bypass candidate in 'vault::transfer_authority' (missing authority check)

limitations: Source triage uses conservative text heuristics. No AST parsing, no compilation, no execution.
4 Anchor account structs detected via heuristic analysis (not engine-derived)
Fuzz maturity scan not requested (pass --include-fuzz-maturity to enable)
Surface mapping uses deterministic engine (parser/IR/graph) as primary source, with conservative text heuristics as fallback. No compilation, no runtime analysis, no execution.
